```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(MTS)
library(tseries)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)
library(nortest)

select <- dplyr::select
```
```{r}
INPUT_FILE <- "../../data/processed/merged_features_weekly.csv"
OUTPUT_DIR <- "outputs"
FREQ       <- 52
ALPHA      <- 0.05

VAR_VARS <- c(
  "target_price",
  "api_energy_and_lubricants",
  "api_fertilisers_and_soil_improvers",
  "api_plant_protection_products",
  "api_fresh_fruit",
  "api_fresh_vegetables",
  "fuel_petrol_price",
  "fuel_diesel_price",
  "sppi_road_freight"
)

EXOG_VARS <- c("shock_2021q4_2023q1", "post_shock")

ORDERS_TO_TRY <- list(
  c(1, 0),
  c(1, 1),
  c(2, 1),
  c(1, 2)
)
```
```{r}
df <- read_csv(INPUT_FILE, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(date = as.Date(date)) %>%
  arrange(date)

target_commodities <- c(
  "Beetroot",
  "Bulb Onions (Yellow)",
  "Cabbage",
  "Carrots",
  "Cucumbers",
  "Curly kale",
  "Lettuce",
  "Tomatoes (Round)"
)

df <- df %>%
  filter(commodity %in% target_commodities)

commodities <- unique(df$commodity)
cat("Filtered commodities:", paste(commodities, collapse = ", "), "\n")
```
```{r}
calc_rmse  <- function(actual, pred) sqrt(mean((actual - pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE))
calc_mae   <- function(actual, pred) mean(abs(actual - pred), na.rm = TRUE)
calc_mape  <- function(actual, pred) mean(abs((actual - pred) / actual) * 100, na.rm = TRUE)
calc_smape <- function(actual, pred) {
  mean(200 * abs(actual - pred) / (abs(actual) + abs(pred)), na.rm = TRUE)
}
calc_mase  <- function(actual, pred, train) {
  naive_mae <- mean(abs(diff(train)), na.rm = TRUE)
  mean(abs(actual - pred), na.rm = TRUE) / naive_mae
}

compile_metrics <- function(actual, pred, train, aic_val, bic_val, label) {
  tibble(
    model = label,
    RMSE  = round(calc_rmse(actual, pred),        4),
    MAE   = round(calc_mae(actual, pred),         4),
    MASE  = round(calc_mase(actual, pred, train), 4),
    sMAPE = round(calc_smape(actual, pred),       4),
    MAPE  = round(calc_mape(actual, pred),        4),
    AIC   = round(aic_val,                        2),
    BIC   = round(bic_val,                        2)
  )
}

make_stationary <- function(x, name, alpha = 0.05) {
  s <- x
  for (d in 0:2) {
    pval <- tryCatch(adf.test(s[!is.na(s)])$p.value, error = function(e) 1)
    if (pval < alpha) return(list(series = s, d = d))
    s <- c(NA, diff(s))
  }
  list(series = s, d = 2)
}

extract_aic_bic <- function(model_obj, n_obs, k, p, q) {
  sig <- model_obj$Sigma
  if (is.null(sig) || any(is.na(sig))) return(list(aic = NA, bic = NA))
  ll       <- -(n_obs / 2) * log(det(sig))
  n_params <- k^2 * (p + q) + k
  list(aic = -2 * ll + 2 * n_params,
       bic = -2 * ll + log(n_obs) * n_params)
}

residual_diagnostics_varma <- function(resid_vec, label) {
  resid_clean <- resid_vec[!is.na(resid_vec)]
  lb10 <- Box.test(resid_clean, lag = 10, type = "Ljung-Box")
  lb20 <- Box.test(resid_clean, lag = 20, type = "Ljung-Box")
  norm_test <- if (length(resid_clean) <= 5000) {
    list(result = shapiro.test(resid_clean), name = "Shapiro-Wilk")
  } else {
    list(result = nortest::ad.test(resid_clean), name = "Anderson-Darling")
  }
  tibble(
    model             = label,
    resid_mean        = round(mean(resid_clean),           6),
    resid_sd          = round(sd(resid_clean),             4),
    ljung_box_lag10_p = round(lb10$p.value,                4),
    ljung_box_lag20_p = round(lb20$p.value,                4),
    normality_test    = norm_test$name,
    normality_p       = round(norm_test$result$p.value,    4),
    autocorr_ok       = lb10$p.value > ALPHA,
    normality_ok      = norm_test$result$p.value > ALPHA
  )
}

plot_residuals <- function(resid_vec, fitted_vec, label) {
  resid_clean <- resid_vec[!is.na(resid_vec)]
  time_idx    <- seq_along(resid_vec)
  ci_bound    <- qnorm(0.975) / sqrt(length(resid_clean))

  p1 <- ggplot(data.frame(t = time_idx, r = resid_vec), aes(t, r)) +
    geom_line(color = "#2c3e50", linewidth = 0.45) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    labs(title = "Residuals over time", x = "Week index", y = "Residual") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

  acf_data <- acf(resid_clean, plot = FALSE, lag.max = 52)
  acf_df   <- data.frame(lag = acf_data$lag[-1], acf = acf_data$acf[-1])
  p2 <- ggplot(acf_df, aes(lag, acf)) +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#2980b9") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-ci_bound, ci_bound), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") +
    labs(title = "ACF of residuals", x = "Lag (weeks)", y = "ACF") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

  pacf_data <- pacf(resid_clean, plot = FALSE, lag.max = 52)
  pacf_df   <- data.frame(lag = pacf_data$lag, pacf = pacf_data$acf)
  p3 <- ggplot(pacf_df, aes(lag, pacf)) +
    geom_segment(aes(xend = lag, yend = 0), color = "#8e44ad") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = c(-ci_bound, ci_bound), linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "black") +
    labs(title = "PACF of residuals", x = "Lag (weeks)", y = "PACF") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

  p4 <- ggplot(data.frame(r = resid_clean), aes(r)) +
    geom_histogram(aes(y = after_stat(density)), bins = 40,
                   fill = "#3498db", color = "white", alpha = 0.7) +
    stat_function(fun = dnorm,
                  args = list(mean = mean(resid_clean), sd = sd(resid_clean)),
                  color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(title = "Residual distribution", x = "Residual", y = "Density") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

  qq    <- qqnorm(resid_clean, plot.it = FALSE)
  qq_df <- data.frame(theoretical = qq$x, sample = qq$y)
  p5 <- ggplot(qq_df, aes(theoretical, sample)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2c3e50", size = 0.8) +
    geom_abline(color = "red", linewidth = 1) +
    labs(title = "Q-Q plot", x = "Theoretical quantiles", y = "Sample quantiles") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

  p6 <- ggplot(data.frame(f = fitted_vec, r = resid_vec), aes(f, r)) +
    geom_point(alpha = 0.35, size = 0.9, color = "#16a085") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "red", linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = FALSE,
                color = "#e67e22", linewidth = 0.8) +
    labs(title = "Residuals vs Fitted", x = "Fitted values", y = "Residual") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11)

  combined <- (p1 | p4) / (p2 | p3) / (p5 | p6) +
    plot_annotation(
      title    = paste0("Residual Diagnostics (target_price equation) — ", label),
      subtitle = "Row 1: Time series & distribution | Row 2: ACF & PACF | Row 3: Q-Q & Residuals vs Fitted",
      theme    = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13))
    )
  print(combined)
}

plot_forecast <- function(train_dates, train_vals,
                          test_dates,  test_vals, pred_vals, label) {
  cutoff   <- train_dates[length(train_dates)] - 365 * 2
  mask     <- train_dates >= cutoff
  train_df <- data.frame(date = train_dates[mask], value = train_vals[mask])
  test_df  <- data.frame(date = test_dates, value = test_vals)
  pred_df  <- data.frame(date = test_dates, value = pred_vals)

  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = train_df, aes(date, value),
              color = "#bdc3c7", linewidth = 0.9) +
    geom_line(data = test_df,  aes(date, value, color = "Actual"),         linewidth = 1.2) +
    geom_line(data = pred_df,  aes(date, value, color = "VARMA forecast"),
              linewidth = 1.2, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Actual" = "#2c3e50", "VARMA forecast" = "#e74c3c"), name = NULL
    ) +
    labs(
      title    = paste0("VARMA Forecast — ", label),
      subtitle = "Dashed = forecast | Grey = last 2 years of training",
      x = NULL, y = "Price"
    ) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"), legend.position = "bottom")
  print(p)
}

plot_irf <- function(model_obj, var_names, p, q, label, n_ahead = 26) {
  irf_plots    <- list()
  impulse_vars <- var_names[var_names != "target_price"]
  tgt_idx      <- which(var_names == "target_price")

  for (imp in impulse_vars) {
    imp_idx <- which(var_names == imp)
    irf_res <- tryCatch(
      VARMAirf(Phi   = model_obj$Phi,
               Theta = if (q > 0) model_obj$Theta else NULL,
               Sigma = model_obj$Sigma,
               lag   = n_ahead, orth = FALSE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(irf_res)) next

    irf_vals <- tryCatch(irf_res[tgt_idx, imp_idx, ], error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(irf_vals)) next

    irf_df <- data.frame(horizon = 0:(n_ahead - 1), irf = irf_vals)
    irf_plots[[imp]] <- ggplot(irf_df, aes(horizon, irf)) +
      geom_line(color = "#2c3e50", linewidth = 0.9) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
      labs(title = imp, x = "Weeks ahead", y = "Response") +
      theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"))
  }

  if (length(irf_plots) == 0) return(invisible(NULL))

  combined <- wrap_plots(irf_plots, ncol = 3) +
    plot_annotation(
      title = paste0("Impulse Response Functions -> target_price\n", label),
      theme = theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13))
    )
  print(combined)
}
```
```{r}
all_metrics <- list()
all_diag    <- list()
```
```{r, fig.width=14, fig.height=12, results="asis", fig.show="asis"}
dir.create(OUTPUT_DIR, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

all_metrics <- list()

for (comm in commodities) {

  sub <- df %>% filter(commodity == comm) %>% arrange(date)

  if (!"split" %in% names(sub)) next

  train_df <- sub %>% filter(split == "train")
  test_df  <- sub %>% filter(split == "test")

  if (nrow(train_df) < 50 || nrow(test_df) == 0) next

  # ── Variable selection ─────────────────────────────────────
  avail_vars <- VAR_VARS[
    VAR_VARS %in% names(sub) &
      sapply(VAR_VARS, function(v) sum(!is.na(train_df[[v]])) > 20)
  ]

  if (!"target_price" %in% avail_vars) next

  avail_vars <- c("target_price", setdiff(avail_vars, "target_price"))
  k <- length(avail_vars)

  # ── Stationarity ───────────────────────────────────────────
  train_mat <- train_df %>%
    select(all_of(avail_vars)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), mean(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

  d_orders   <- setNames(integer(k), avail_vars)
  train_stat <- train_mat

  for (v in avail_vars) {
    res <- make_stationary(train_mat[[v]], v, ALPHA)
    train_stat[[v]] <- res$series
    d_orders[v]     <- res$d
  }

  train_stat <- drop_na(train_stat)
  if (nrow(train_stat) < 50) next

  # ── Select VARMA order (silent) ────────────────────────────
  order_results <- list()

  for (ord in ORDERS_TO_TRY) {
    p <- ord[1]; q <- ord[2]
    min_rows <- k * (p + q + 10)
    if (nrow(train_stat) < min_rows) next

    m <- tryCatch(
      VARMA(as.matrix(train_stat), p = p, q = q, include.mean = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(m)) next

    info <- extract_aic_bic(m, nrow(train_stat), k, p, q)
    order_results[[paste0(p, ",", q)]] <- list(
      model = m, p = p, q = q, aic = info$aic, bic = info$bic
    )
  }

  if (length(order_results) == 0) next

  best       <- order_results[[which.min(sapply(order_results, `[[`, "bic"))]]
  model_best <- best$model

  # ── Walk-forward forecast (silent) ─────────────────────────
  n_test   <- nrow(test_df)
  pred_vals <- numeric(n_test)

  all_data <- bind_rows(train_df, test_df) %>%
    select(all_of(avail_vars)) %>%
    mutate(across(everything(), ~ ifelse(is.na(.), mean(., na.rm = TRUE), .)))

  for (i in seq_len(n_test)) {
    wf_train <- all_data[1:(nrow(train_df) + i - 1), avail_vars, drop = FALSE]

    wf_stat <- wf_train
    for (v in avail_vars)
      for (d in seq_len(d_orders[v]))
        wf_stat[[v]] <- c(NA, diff(wf_stat[[v]]))

    wf_stat <- drop_na(wf_stat)

    m <- tryCatch(
      VARMA(as.matrix(wf_stat), p = best$p, q = best$q, include.mean = TRUE),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(m)) next

    fc <- tryCatch(VARMApred(m, h = 1), error = function(e) NULL)
    if (is.null(fc)) next

    pred_vals[i] <- as.numeric(fc$pred)[1]
  }

  actual <- test_df$target_price
  valid  <- !is.na(pred_vals)

  metrics <- compile_metrics(
    actual  = actual[valid],
    pred    = pred_vals[valid],
    train   = train_df$target_price,
    aic_val = best$aic,
    bic_val = best$bic,
    label   = paste0(comm, " — VARMA(", best$p, ",", best$q, ")")
  )

  all_metrics[[comm]] <- metrics

  # ── Residuals (safe) ───────────────────────────────────────
  resid_target  <- NULL
  fitted_target <- NULL

  resid_mat <- tryCatch(model_best$residuals, error = function(e) NULL)
  tgt_idx   <- which(avail_vars == "target_price")

  if (!is.null(resid_mat) && is.matrix(resid_mat) && ncol(resid_mat) >= tgt_idx) {
    resid_target  <- as.numeric(resid_mat[, tgt_idx])
    fitted_target <- tail(train_stat$target_price, length(resid_target)) - resid_target
  }

  # ── FINAL OUTPUT (ONLY WHAT YOU WANT) ──────────────────────
  cat("\n\n## Commodity:", comm, "\n")

  print(metrics)

  if (!is.null(resid_target) && !all(is.na(resid_target))) {
    print(plot_residuals(resid_target, fitted_target, comm))
  }

  print(
    plot_forecast(
      train_dates = train_df$date,
      train_vals  = train_df$target_price,
      test_dates  = test_df$date,
      test_vals   = actual,
      pred_vals   = pred_vals,
      label       = comm
    )
  )

  print(
    plot_irf(
      model_obj = model_best,
      var_names = avail_vars,
      p = best$p, q = best$q,
      label = comm
    )
  )
}
```
```{r}
metrics_df <- bind_rows(all_metrics)
diag_df    <- bind_rows(all_diag)

cat("\n\n", strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("  VARMA MODEL PERFORMANCE METRICS\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
print(metrics_df, n = Inf)

cat("\n\n", strrep("=", 70), "\n")
cat("  RESIDUAL DIAGNOSTICS (target_price equation)\n")
cat(strrep("=", 70), "\n")
print(diag_df, n = Inf)

write_csv(metrics_df, file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "varma_metrics_filtered.csv"))
if (nrow(diag_df) > 0)
  write_csv(diag_df, file.path(OUTPUT_DIR, "varma_residual_diagnostics_filtered.csv"))

cat("\n✅ Done.\n")
```
